text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I don't want anything tying me down! Total
freedom—that's my dream!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: That's why I'm running my way here at the spring Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
It's time to kick off! I'm the best, and I'm feelin'
the best!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Let's. Freakin'. Party! Waheeey!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Catch you guys after!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
That's right! ☆ You got this, queen! Ignore the
pressure, do your thing, and leave no crumbs! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer shakes her shoulders as if shrugging
something off, pumps herself up, and heads down
the runners' tunnel. And then...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(The Tenno Sho... Winning this race has always
been one of the big goals for all Mejiro
Umamusume...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(And now... it's finally my turn! I'm on equal
footing with them today!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Oh? Is that... Hey, McQueen! Hey, Ryan!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
This is the race I've had my heart on from the
beginning—the promised land.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I will be racing to the best of my ability and
bringing home victory for the Mejiro estate!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I know this is a super important race for you,
McQueen. I get that. But...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'm a Mejiro too! I'm not just gonna let you win!
I'm gonna keep moving forward until I'm right
where I wanna be!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
My name is Mejiro McQueen, and I hope
everyone enjoys the race today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I'm Mejiro Ryan. Thank you all for coming!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
The atmosphere is so... different. It's like a whole
different league—like a different sport. I guess
that's the Tenno Sho for you...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(And I'm supposed to party in the middle of all
this? After everyone just made all these super
stiff introductions?)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(But that doesn't matter! I'm free! I've gotta
remember I'm free!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(I can do whatever I want! I can go all the way off
the rails if I want! And that's just what I'm gonna
do!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Meji... Meji... Mejirooo!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Yesss, Palmster! ☆ Go off!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(Everyone has something important to them
riding on this race. Especially McQueen...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(Compared to her, my determination, dream, and
pride... They're practically nothing...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Meji...ro... Palmer... in the h...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Ahem. I'm Mejiro Palmer. Let's have a good race...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: What happened to Palmster?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She falters in her big introduction. The racecourse
is still buzzing, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The formality of the event is apparently too much
for one girl's self-confidence.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Trainer...
choice_data_list: Hold on. We still don't know what she'll do.
Hold on. We still don't know what she'll do.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She might not be able to act the way she wants in
the paddock, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All bets are off when it comes to the actual race.
All we can do is pray that Mejiro Palmer can run
the way she wants to.
